_notes: The sustainability measures STING tracks (Phase 195). Each carries the gate it
affects (energy/water/materials), a description, and a COST HANDLE (a BOQ rate key
or CST_* link) so Sustain_LccBenefit can roll capex + lifetime opex/savings into the
Design Development Cost/Budget Estimate via the BOQ Cost Manager. costHandle.type is
'boqRateKey' (lookup into the project rate book) or 'cstParam' (read CST_* off elements).
savingsModel gives a simple annual operational saving estimate for the LCC roll-up;
values are indicative defaults, overridable in the project measures override.
Project override merged by id from

measures.name: Roof / facade solar PV
measures.description: On-site PV generation offsetting grid/diesel import.

savingsModel.note: Driven by SupplyAndGenerationLayer PV kWh x energy tariff.

measures.name: Laminated solar-control glazing
measures.description: Low-SHGC laminated glazing cutting cooling load in hot climates.

measures.name: High-performance HVAC + BMS
measures.description: Higher seasonal COP/SEER chillers + demand-controlled ventilation via BMS.

measures.name: LED lighting + daylight controls
measures.description: Low-LPD LED luminaires with occupancy + daylight dimming.

measures.name: Low-flow sanitary fixtures
measures.description: Dual-flush WCs, low-flow taps/showers, waterless / low-volume urinals.

measures.name: Rainwater harvesting
measures.description: Roof rainwater capture + storage for WC flushing / irrigation (BS 8515).

savingsModel.note: Driven by AnnualWaterEstimator RWH yield x water tariff.

measures.name: Grey-water reuse
measures.description: Treated grey-water reused for WC flushing / irrigation.

measures.name: Low-carbon structural materials
measures.description: GGBS/PFA cement replacement, recycled steel, responsibly-sourced timber.
